---
name: Question / Support
about: Need help using KoBar or configuring a specific module? Ask here!
title: "[QUESTION]"
labels: question
assignees: eedali

---

**What is your question?**
A clear and concise description of what you need help with. (e.g., "How do I connect my local Ollama model to the AI Hub?", "How do I manage my Snippet Vault passwords?", or "How does the Ghost Window transparency work?")

**What have you tried so far?**
Let us know if you've already checked the Settings, Workspaces, or tried specific steps before asking.

**Screenshots (Optional)**
If your question is about a specific visual element, a missing button, or a layout issue, dropping a screenshot here helps a lot!
